title: The World and the Flesh
writer: Oliver H.P. Garrett, Ernst Spitz, Phillipp Zeska
actors: George Bancroft, Miriam Hopkins, Alan Mowbray
plot: During the 1917 Russian revolution, a group of artistocrats find themselves in the custody of a brutal Communist revolutionary. He lusts after one of them, a ballerina, and gives her an ultimatum: give in to him or her friends wil...
